# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
spec:
  port: 4140

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authz
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice1
      to:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice2
      ports:
        - 80
    - from:
        serviceAccountSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.serviceaccount.namespace: default
          - io.kubernetes.serviceaccount.name: mysa
      to:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice3
      ports:
        - 8080

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authz-ports
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice4
      to:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice5
      ports:
        - 443

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authz-sa
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        serviceAccountSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.serviceaccount.namespace: default
          - io.kubernetes.serviceaccount.name: mysa2
      to:
        serviceSelectors:
          - io.kubernetes.cluster.local/svc: myservice6
